Comparing the number of flu hospitalizations estimated so far this season with previous end-of-season hospitalization estimates 
The estimates on this page are preliminary, cumulative and will increase as the season progresses. Past end-of-season estimates of flu-related hospitalizations (2010-2024) have ranged from 120,000-710,000.
